# Plan: Move watch command to pkg/cmd/watch.go and restructure shared code

## Context

The watch command lives in main.go as `createWatchCommand()` (lines 553-808). Other commands (check, list, login, logout, version) already live in `pkg/cmd/`. Moving watch follows the same pattern to reduce the main.go monolith.

The watch command depends on shared helpers in main.go that are also used by run and sync. Since run and sync will move out next, these shared functions should move to proper packages now ‚Äî not stay in main.go as a temporary home.

Architecture decisions (from user):
- `checkAndWarnAuthentication` ‚Üí `pkg/cmd/` as a shared helper
- `getUseUTC` ‚Üí inline at each call site (2-line function, 5 callers)
- provenance wrappers ‚Üí `pkg/provenance/provenance.go`
- rename `pkg/markdown/` ‚Üí `pkg/session/`, add `session.go` for session processing
- `truncateSessionID` ‚Üí `pkg/cmd/watch.go` (only used by watch)

## Changes

### 1. Rename `pkg/markdown/` ‚Üí `pkg/session/`

- `pkg/markdown/markdown.go` ‚Üí `pkg/session/markdown.go`: change `package markdown` ‚Üí `package session`
- `pkg/markdown/markdown_test.go` ‚Üí `pkg/session/markdown_test.go`: change `package markdown` ‚Üí `package session`
- Update import in `main.go`: `pkg/markdown` ‚Üí `pkg/session`
- Update comment references in `pkg/providers/geminicli/markdown_tools.go` and `markdown_tools_test.go`

### 2. Create `pkg/session/session.go`

Move these functions from main.go, exporting them:

- **`ProcessSingleSession`** (main.go:1139-1264) ‚Äî writes markdown, triggers cloud sync. Add `onlyCloudSync bool` as a parameter (currently reads package-level var). Use `log.IsSilent()` instead of main.go's `silent` var. Can call `GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession` directly (same package).
- **`BuildSessionFilePath`** (main.go:1121-1132) ‚Äî constructs markdown file path from session metadata
- **`FormatFilenameTimestamp`** (main.go:1110-1119) ‚Äî formats timestamp for filenames (used by `BuildSessionFilePath`)
- **`ValidateSessionData`** (main.go:1084-1097) ‚Äî schema validation in debug mode
- **`WriteDebugSessionData`** (main.go:1099-1108) ‚Äî writes debug JSON files

`ProcessSingleSession` signature change:
```go
// Before (main.go):
func processSingleSession(session, config, showOutput, isAutosave, debugRaw, useUTC) (int, error)
// uses package vars: onlyCloudSync, silent

// After (pkg/session/session.go):
func ProcessSingleSession(session, config, onlyCloudSync, showOutput, isAutosave, debugRaw, useUTC) (int, error)
// uses log.IsSilent() for silent check
```

Callers (3 sites in main.go) add `onlyCloudSync` argument.

Note: `syncProvider` (main.go:1304+) has its own inline markdown/file logic and does NOT call `processSingleSession`. That's a pre-existing DRY issue but out of scope for this change.

### 3. Create `pkg/provenance/provenance.go`

Move these wrapper functions from main.go (lines 60-108):

- **`StartEngine(enabled bool) (*Engine, func(), error)`** ‚Äî wraps `NewEngine()` with nil/no-op when disabled. Takes `enabled` parameter instead of reading `provenanceEnabled` package var.
- **`StartFSWatcher(ctx context.Context, engine *Engine, rootDir string) (func(), error)`** ‚Äî wraps `NewFSWatcher()` with nil check. Same signature as today.
- **`ProcessEvents(ctx context.Context, engine *Engine, session *spi.AgentChatSession)`** ‚Äî nil-safe wrapper around `ProcessSessionEvents`. Same signature as today.

### 4. Create `pkg/cmd/utils.go`

Move `checkAndWarnAuthentication` from main.go (lines 171-187):

- **`CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync bool)`** ‚Äî uses `log.IsSilent()` for silent check, imports `cloud` and `log` packages directly.

Callers (5 sites): `checkAndWarnAuthentication()` ‚Üí `cmd.CheckAndWarnAuthentication(noCloudSync)`

Replace all 5 call sites with:

   140‚Üífunc validateFlags() error {

   143‚Üí	}

   171‚Üífunc checkAndWarnAuthentication() {
   172‚Üí	if !noCloudSync && !cloud.IsAuthenticated() && !silent {
   173‚Üí		// Check if this was due to a 401 authentication failure
   174‚Üí		if cloud.HadAuthFailure() {
   175‚Üí			// Show the specific message for auth failures with orange warning and emoji
   176‚Üí			slog.Warn("Cloud sync authentication failed (401)")
   177‚Üí			log.UserWarn("‚öÝÔ∏è Unable to authenticate with SpecStory Cloud. This could be due to revoked or expired credentials, or network/server issues.\n")
   178‚Üí			log.UserMessage("‚ÑπÔ∏è If this persists, run `specstory logout` then `specstory login` to reset your SpecStory Cloud authentication.\n")
   179‚Üí		} else {
   180‚Üí			// Regular "not authenticated" message
   181‚Üí			msg := "‚öÝÔ∏è Cloud sync not available. You're not authenticated."
   182‚Üí			slog.Warn(msg)
   183‚Üí			log.UserWarn("%s\n", msg)
   184‚Üí			log.UserMessage("‚ÑπÔ∏è Use `specstory login` to authenticate, or `--no-cloud-sync` to skip this warning.\n")
   185‚Üí		}
   186‚Üí	}
   187‚Üí}
