```text
   189‚Üí// createRootCommand dynamically creates the root command with provider information
   190‚Üífunc createRootCommand() *cobra.Command {
   191‚Üí	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   192‚Üí	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   193‚Üí	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   194‚Üí
   195‚Üí	// Build dynamic examples based on registered providers
   196‚Üí	examples := `
   197‚Üí# Check terminal coding agents installation
   198‚Üíspecstory check
   199‚Üí
   200‚Üí# Run the default agent with auto-saving
   201‚Üíspecstory run`
   202‚Üí
   203‚Üí	// Add provider-specific examples if we have providers
   204‚Üí	if len(ids) > 0 {
   205‚Üí		examples += "\n\n# Run a specific agent with auto-saving"
   206‚Üí		for _, id := range ids {
   207‚Üí			if provider, _ := registry.Get(id); provider != nil {
   208‚Üí				examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory run %s", id)
   209‚Üí			}
   210‚Üí		}
   211‚Üí
   212‚Üí		// Use first provider for custom command example
   213‚Üí		examples += fmt.Sprintf("\n\n# Run with custom command\nspecstory run %s -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\"", ids[0])
   214‚Üí	}
   215‚Üí
   216‚Üí	examples += `
   217‚Üí
   218‚Üí# Generate markdown files for all agent sessions associated with the current directory
   219‚Üíspecstory sync
   220‚Üí
   221‚Üí# Generate markdown files for specific agent sessions
   222‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id>
   223‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id-1> -s <session-id-2>
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üí# Watch for any agent activity in the current directory and generate markdown files
   226‚Üíspecstory watch`
   227‚Üí
   228‚Üí	longDesc := `SpecStory is a wrapper for terminal coding agents that auto-saves markdown files of all your chat interactions.`
   229‚Üí	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   230‚Üí		longDesc += "\n\nSupported agents: " + providerList + "."
   231‚Üí	}
   232‚Üí
   233‚Üí	return &cobra.Command{
   234‚Üí		Use:               "specstory [command]",
   235‚Üí		Short:             "SpecStory auto-saves terminal coding agent chat interactions",
   236‚Üí		Long:              longDesc,
   237‚Üí		Example:           examples,
   238‚Üí		SilenceUsage:      true,
   239‚Üí		SilenceErrors:     true,
   240‚Üí		DisableAutoGenTag: true,
   241‚Üí		CompletionOptions: cobra.CompletionOptions{DisableDefaultCmd: true},
   242‚Üí		PersistentPreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   243‚Üí			// Validate flags before any other setup
   244‚Üí			if err := validateFlags(); err != nil {
   245‚Üí				fmt.Println() // Add visual separation before error message for better CLI readability
   246‚Üí				return err
   247‚Üí			}
   248‚Üí
   249‚Üí			// Configure logging based on flags
   250‚Üí			if console || logFile {
   251‚Üí				// Create output config to get proper log path if needed
   252‚Üí				var logPath string
   253‚Üí				if logFile {
   254‚Üí					config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
   255‚Üí					if err != nil {
   256‚Üí						return err
   257‚Üí					}
   258‚Üí					logPath = config.GetLogPath()
   259‚Üí				}
   260‚Üí
   261‚Üí				// Set up logger
   262‚Üí				if err := log.SetupLogger(console, logFile, debug, logPath); err != nil {
   263‚Üí					return fmt.Errorf("failed to set up logger: %v", err)
   264‚Üí				}
   265‚Üí
   266‚Üí				// Log startup information
   267‚Üí				slog.Info("=== SpecStory Starting ===")
   268‚Üí				slog.Info("Version", "version", version)
   269‚Üí				slog.Info("Command line", "args", strings.Join(os.Args, " "))
   270‚Üí				if cwd, err := os.Getwd(); err == nil {
   271‚Üí					slog.Info("Current working directory", "cwd", cwd)
   272‚Üí				}
   273‚Üí				slog.Info("========================")
   274‚Üí			} else {
   275‚Üí				// No logging - set up discard logger
   276‚Üí				if err := log.SetupLogger(false, false, false, ""); err != nil {
   277‚Üí					return err
   278‚Üí				}
   279‚Üí			}
   280‚Üí
   281‚Üí			// Set silent mode for user messages
   282‚Üí			log.SetSilent(silent)
   283‚Üí
   284‚Üí			// Initialize cloud sync manager
   285‚Üí			cloud.InitSyncManager(!noCloudSync)
   286‚Üí			cloud.SetSilent(silent)
   287‚Üí			cloud.SetClientVersion(version)
   288‚Üí			// Set custom cloud URL if provided (otherwise cloud package uses its default)
   289‚Üí			if cloudURL != "" {
   290‚Üí				cloud.SetAPIBaseURL(cloudURL)
   291‚Üí			}
   292‚Üí
   293‚Üí			// If --cloud-token flag was provided, verify the refresh token works
   294‚Üí			// This bypasses normal authentication and uses the token for this session only
   295‚Üí			if cloudToken != "" {
   296‚Üí				slog.Info("Using session-only refresh token from --cloud-token flag")
   297‚Üí				if err := cloud.SetSessionRefreshToken(cloudToken); err != nil {
   298‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr) // Visual separation
   299‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "‚ùå Failed to authenticate with the provided token:")
   300‚Üí					fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "   %v\n", err)
   301‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr)
   302‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "üí° The token may be invalid, expired, or revoked.")
   303‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "   Please check your token and try again, or use 'specstory login' for interactive authentication.")
   304‚Üí					fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr)
   305‚Üí					return fmt.Errorf("authentication failed with provided token")
   306‚Üí				}
   307‚Üí				if !silent {
   308‚Üí					fmt.Println()
   309‚Üí					fmt.Println("üîë Authenticated using provided refresh token (session-only)")
   310‚Üí					fmt.Println()
   311‚Üí				}
   312‚Üí			}
   313‚Üí
   314‚Üí			// Validate that --only-cloud-sync requires authentication
   315‚Üí			if onlyCloudSync && !cloud.IsAuthenticated() {
   316‚Üí				return utils.ValidationError{Message: "--only-cloud-sync requires authentication. Please run 'specstory login' first"}
   317‚Üí			}
   318‚Üí
   319‚Üí			return nil
   320‚Üí		},
   321‚Üí		Run: func(c *cobra.Command, args []string) {
   322‚Üí			// Track help command usage (when no command is specified)
   323‚Üí			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventHelpCommand, analytics.Properties{
   324‚Üí				"help_topic":  "general",
   325‚Üí				"help_reason": "requested",
   326‚Üí			})
   327‚Üí			// If no command is specified, show logo then help
   328‚Üí			cmd.DisplayLogoAndHelp(c)
   329‚Üí		},
   330‚Üí	}
   331‚Üí}
   332‚Üí
   333‚Üívar rootCmd *cobra.Command
   334‚Üí
   335‚Üí// createRunCommand dynamically creates the run command with provider information
   336‚Üífunc createRunCommand() *cobra.Command {
   337‚Üí	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   338‚Üí	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   339‚Üí	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   340‚Üí
   341‚Üí	// Build dynamic examples
   342‚Üí	examples := `
   343‚Üí# Run default agent with auto-saving
   344‚Üíspecstory run`
   345‚Üí
   346‚Üí	if len(ids) > 0 {
   347‚Üí		examples += "\n\n# Run specific agent"
   348‚Üí		for _, id := range ids {
   349‚Üí			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory run %s", id)
   350‚Üí		}
   351‚Üí
   352‚Üí		// Use first provider for custom command example
   353‚Üí		examples += fmt.Sprintf("\n\n# Run with custom command\nspecstory run %s -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\"", ids[0])
   354‚Üí	}
   355‚Üí
   356‚Üí	examples += `
   357‚Üí
   358‚Üí# Resume a specific session
   359‚Üíspecstory run --resume 5c5c2876-febd-4c87-b80c-d0655f1cd3fd
   360‚Üí
   361‚Üí# Run with custom output directory
   362‚Üíspecstory run --output-dir ~/my-sessions`
   363‚Üí
   364‚Üí	// Determine default agent name
   365‚Üí	defaultAgent := "the default agent"
   366‚Üí	if len(ids) > 0 {
   367‚Üí		if provider, err := registry.Get(ids[0]); err == nil {
   368‚Üí			defaultAgent = provider.Name()
   369‚Üí		}
   370‚Üí	}
   371‚Üí
   372‚Üí	longDesc := fmt.Sprintf(`Launch terminal coding agents in interactive mode with auto-save markdown file generation.
   373‚Üí
   374‚ÜíBy default, launches %s. Specify a specific agent ID to use a different agent.`, defaultAgent)
   375‚Üí	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   376‚Üí		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
   377‚Üí	}
   378‚Üí
   379‚Üí	return &cobra.Command{
   380‚Üí		Use:     "run [provider-id]",
   381‚Üí		Aliases: []string{"r"},
   382‚Üí		Short:   "Launch terminal coding agents in interactive mode with auto-save",
   383‚Üí		Long:    longDesc,
   384‚Üí		Example: examples,
   385‚Üí		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
   386‚Üí		PreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   387‚Üí			// Get custom command if provided via flag
   388‚Üí			customCmd, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("command")
   389‚Üí
   390‚Üí			// Validate that -c flag requires a provider
   391‚Üí			if customCmd != "" && len(args) == 0 {
   392‚Üí				registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   393‚Üí				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   394‚Üí				example := "specstory run <provider> -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\""
   395‚Üí				if len(ids) > 0 {
   396‚Üí					example = fmt.Sprintf("specstory run %s -c \"/custom/path/to/agent\"", ids[0])
   397‚Üí				}
   398‚Üí				return utils.ValidationError{
   399‚Üí					Message: "The -c/--command flag requires a provider to be specified.\n" +
   400‚Üí						"Example: " + example,
   401‚Üí				}
   402‚Üí			}
   403‚Üí			return nil
   404‚Üí		},
   405‚Üí		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   406‚Üí			slog.Info("Running in interactive mode")
   407‚Üí
   408‚Üí			// Get custom command if provided via flag
   409‚Üí			customCmd, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("command")
   410‚Üí
   411‚Üí			// Get the provider
   412‚Üí			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   413‚Üí			var providerID string
   414‚Üí			if len(args) == 0 {
   415‚Üí				// Default to first registered provider
   416‚Üí				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   417‚Üí				if len(ids) > 0 {
   418‚Üí					providerID = ids[0]
   419‚Üí				} else {
   420‚Üí					return fmt.Errorf("no providers registered")
   421‚Üí				}
   422‚Üí			} else {
   423‚Üí				providerID = args[0]
   424‚Üí			}
   425‚Üí
   426‚Üí			provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
   427‚Üí			if err != nil {
   428‚Üí				// Provider not found - show helpful error
   429‚Üí				fmt.Printf("‚ùå Provider '%s' is not a valid provider implementation\n\n", providerID)
   430‚Üí
   431‚Üí				ids := registry.ListIDs()
   432‚Üí				if len(ids) > 0 {
   433‚Üí					fmt.Println("The registered providers are:")
   434‚Üí					for _, id := range ids {
   435‚Üí						if p, _ := registry.Get(id); p != nil {
   436‚Üí							fmt.Printf("  ‚Ä¢ %s - %s\n", id, p.Name())
   437‚Üí						}
   438‚Üí					}
   439‚Üí					fmt.Println("\nExample: specstory run " + ids[0])
   440‚Üí				}
   441‚Üí				return err
   442‚Üí			}
   443‚Üí
   444‚Üí			slog.Info("Launching agent", "provider", provider.Name())
   445‚Üí
   446‚Üí			// Set the agent provider for analytics
   447‚Üí			analytics.SetAgentProviders([]string{provider.Name()})
   448‚Üí
   449‚Üí			// Setup output configuration
   450‚Üí			config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
   451‚Üí			if err != nil {
   452‚Üí				return err
   453‚Üí			}
   454‚Üí			// Ensure history directory exists for interactive mode
   455‚Üí			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   456‚Üí				return err
   457‚Üí			}
   458‚Üí
   459‚Üí			// Initialize project identity
   460‚Üí			cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   461‚Üí			if err != nil {
   462‚Üí				slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   463‚Üí				return err
   464‚Üí			}
   465‚Üí			identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
   466‚Üí			if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   467‚Üí				// Log error but don't fail the command
   468‚Üí				slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   469‚Üí			}
   470‚Üí
   471‚Üí			// Create context for graceful cancellation (Ctrl+C handling)
   472‚Üí			ctx, cancel := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
   473‚Üí			defer cancel()
   474‚Üí
   475‚Üí			// Start provenance infrastructure before the agent so all file changes are captured
   476‚Üí			provenanceEngine, provenanceCleanup, err := startProvenanceEngine()
   477‚Üí			if err != nil {
   478‚Üí				return err
   479‚Üí			}
   480‚Üí			defer provenanceCleanup()
   481‚Üí
   482‚Üí			fsCleanup, err := startProvenanceFSWatcher(ctx, provenanceEngine, cwd)
   483‚Üí			if err != nil {
   484‚Üí				return err
   485‚Üí			}
   486‚Üí			defer fsCleanup()
   487‚Üí
   488‚Üí			// Check authentication for cloud sync
   489‚Üí			checkAndWarnAuthentication()
   490‚Üí			// Track extension activation
   491‚Üí			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventExtensionActivated, nil)
   492‚Üí
   493‚Üí			// Get resume session ID if provided
   494‚Üí			resumeSessionID, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("resume")
   495‚Üí			if resumeSessionID != "" {
   496‚Üí				resumeSessionID = strings.TrimSpace(resumeSessionID)
   497‚Üí				// Note: Different providers may have different session ID formats
   498‚Üí				// Let the provider validate its own format
   499‚Üí				slog.Info("Resuming session", "sessionId", resumeSessionID)
   500‚Üí			}
   501‚Üí
   502‚Üí			// Get debug-raw flag value (must be before callback to capture in closure)
   503‚Üí			debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   504‚Üí			useUTC := getUseUTC(cmd)
   505‚Üí
   506‚Üí			// This callback pattern enables real-time processing of agent sessions
   507‚Üí			// without blocking the agent's execution. As the agent writes updates to its
   508‚Üí			// data files, the provider's watcher detects changes and invokes this callback,
   509‚Üí			// allowing immediate markdown generation and cloud sync. Errors are logged but
   510‚Üí			// don't stop execution because transient failures (e.g., network issues) shouldn't
   511‚Üí			// interrupt the user's coding session.
   512‚Üí			sessionCallback := func(session *spi.AgentChatSession) {
   513‚Üí				if session == nil {
   514‚Üí					return
   515‚Üí				}
   516‚Üí
   517‚Üí				// Track the session ID for deep linking on exit
   518‚Üí				lastRunSessionID = session.SessionID
   519‚Üí
   520‚Üí				// Process the session (write markdown and sync to cloud)
   521‚Üí				// Don't show output during interactive run mode
   522‚Üí				// This is autosave mode (true)
   523‚Üí				_, err := processSingleSession(session, config, false, true, debugRaw, useUTC)
   524‚Üí				if err != nil {
   525‚Üí					// Log error but continue - don't fail the whole run
   526‚Üí					// In interactive mode, we prioritize keeping the agent running.
   527‚Üí					// Failed markdown writes or cloud syncs can be retried later via
   528‚Üí					// the sync command, so we just log and continue.
   529‚Üí					slog.Error("Failed to process session update",
   530‚Üí						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   531‚Üí						"error", err)
   532‚Üí				}
   533‚Üí
   534‚Üí				// Push agent events to provenance engine for correlation
   535‚Üí				processProvenanceEvents(ctx, provenanceEngine, session)
   536‚Üí			}
   537‚Üí
   538‚Üí			// Execute the agent and watch for updates
   539‚Üí			slog.Info("Starting agent execution and monitoring", "provider", provider.Name())
   540‚Üí			err = provider.ExecAgentAndWatch(cwd, customCmd, resumeSessionID, debugRaw, sessionCallback)
   541‚Üí
   542‚Üí			if err != nil {
   543‚Üí				slog.Error("Agent execution failed", "provider", provider.Name(), "error", err)
   544‚Üí			}
   545‚Üí
   546‚Üí			return err
   547‚Üí		},
   548‚Üí	}
   549‚Üí}
   550‚Üí
   551‚Üívar runCmd *cobra.Command
   552‚Üí
   553‚Üí// createWatchCommand dynamically creates the watch command with provider information
   554‚Üífunc createWatchCommand() *cobra.Command {
   555‚Üí	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   556‚Üí	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   557‚Üí	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   558‚Üí
   559‚Üí	// Build dynamic examples
   560‚Üí	examples := `
   561‚Üí# Watch all registered agent providers for activity
   562‚Üíspecstory watch`
   563‚Üí
   564‚Üí	if len(ids) > 0 {
   565‚Üí		examples += "\n\n# Watch for activity from a specific agent"
   566‚Üí		for _, id := range ids {
   567‚Üí			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory watch %s", id)
   568‚Üí		}
   569‚Üí	}
   570‚Üí
   571‚Üí	examples += `
   572‚Üí
   573‚Üí# Watch with custom output directory
   574‚Üíspecstory watch --output-dir ~/my-sessions`
   575‚Üí
   576‚Üí	longDesc := `Watch for coding agent activity in the current directory and auto-save markdown files.
   577‚Üí
   578‚ÜíUnlike 'run', this command does not launch a coding agent - it only monitors for agent activity.
   579‚ÜíUse this when you want to run the agent separately, but still want auto-saved markdown files.
   580‚Üí
   581‚ÜíBy default, 'watch' is for activity from all registered agent providers. Specify a specific agent ID to watch for activity from only that agent.`
   582‚Üí	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   583‚Üí		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
   584‚Üí	}
   585‚Üí
   586‚Üí	return &cobra.Command{
   587‚Üí		Use:     "watch [provider-id]",
   588‚Üí		Aliases: []string{"w"},
   589‚Üí		Short:   "Watch for coding agent activity with auto-save",
   590‚Üí		Long:    longDesc,
   591‚Üí		Example: examples,
   592‚Üí		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
   593‚Üí		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   594‚Üí			slog.Info("Running in watch mode")
   595‚Üí
   596‚Üí			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   597‚Üí
   598‚Üí			// Get debug-raw flag value
   599‚Üí			debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   600‚Üí			useUTC := getUseUTC(cmd)
   601‚Üí
   602‚Üí			// Setup output configuration
   603‚Üí			config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
   604‚Üí			if err != nil {
   605‚Üí				return err
   606‚Üí			}
   607‚Üí
   608‚Üí			// Ensure history directory exists for watch mode
   609‚Üí			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   610‚Üí				return err
   611‚Üí			}
   612‚Üí
   613‚Üí			// Initialize project identity (needed for cloud sync)
   614‚Üí			cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   615‚Üí			if err != nil {
   616‚Üí				slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   617‚Üí				return err
   618‚Üí			}
   619‚Üí			if _, err := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd).EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   620‚Üí				// Log error but don't fail the command
   621‚Üí				slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   622‚Üí			}
   623‚Üí
   624‚Üí			// Check authentication for cloud sync
   625‚Üí			checkAndWarnAuthentication()
   626‚Üí
   627‚Üí			// Validate that --only-cloud-sync requires authentication
   628‚Üí			if onlyCloudSync && !cloud.IsAuthenticated() {
   629‚Üí				return utils.ValidationError{Message: "--only-cloud-sync requires authentication. Please run 'specstory login' first"}
   630‚Üí			}
   631‚Üí
   632‚Üí			// Start provenance engine if enabled (used in later phases for event correlation)
   633‚Üí			provenanceEngine, provenanceCleanup, err := startProvenanceEngine()
   634‚Üí			if err != nil {
   635‚Üí				return err
   636‚Üí			}
   637‚Üí			defer provenanceCleanup()
   638‚Üí
   639‚Üí			providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
   640‚Üí			if len(providerIDs) == 0 {
   641‚Üí				return fmt.Errorf("no providers registered")
   642‚Üí			}
   643‚Üí			if len(args) > 0 {
   644‚Üí				providerIDs = []string{args[0]}
   645‚Üí			}
   646‚Üí
   647‚Üí			// Collect provider names for analytics
   648‚Üí			providers := make(map[string]spi.Provider)
   649‚Üí			for _, id := range providerIDs {
   650‚Üí				if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
   651‚Üí					providers[id] = provider
   652‚Üí				} else {
   653‚Üí					return fmt.Errorf("no provider %s found", id)
   654‚Üí				}
   655‚Üí			}
   656‚Üí			var providerNames []string
   657‚Üí			// Get all provider names from the providers map
   658‚Üí			for _, provider := range providers {
   659‚Üí				providerNames = append(providerNames, provider.Name())
   660‚Üí			}
   661‚Üí			analytics.SetAgentProviders(providerNames)
   662‚Üí
   663‚Üí			// Track watch command activation
   664‚Üí			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventWatchActivated, nil)
   665‚Üí
   666‚Üí			// Create context for graceful cancellation (Ctrl+C handling)
   667‚Üí			// This allows providers to clean up resources when user presses Ctrl+C
   668‚Üí			ctx, cancel := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
   669‚Üí			defer cancel()
   670‚Üí
   671‚Üí			// Start filesystem watcher for provenance correlation if enabled (uses signal context for Ctrl+C)
   672‚Üí			fsCleanup, err := startProvenanceFSWatcher(ctx, provenanceEngine, cwd)
   673‚Üí			if err != nil {
   674‚Üí				return err
   675‚Üí			}
   676‚Üí			defer fsCleanup()
   677‚Üí
   678‚Üí			if !silent && !jsonOutput {
   679‚Üí				fmt.Println()
   680‚Üí				agentWord := "agents"
   681‚Üí				if len(providerNames) == 1 {
   682‚Üí					agentWord = "agent"
   683‚Üí				}
   684‚Üí				fmt.Println("üëÄ Watching for activity from " + agentWord + ": " + strings.Join(providerNames, ", "))
   685‚Üí				fmt.Println("   Press Ctrl+C to stop watching")
   686‚Üí				fmt.Println()
   687‚Üí			}
   688‚Üí
   689‚Üí			// Track sessions we've seen to suppress initial-scan output.
   690‚Üí			// Existing sessions found at startup get their markdown refreshed
   691‚Üí			// but don't produce output ‚Äî only new activity does.
   692‚Üí			var seenMu sync.Mutex
   693‚Üí			seenSessions := make(map[string]bool)
   694‚Üí
   695‚Üí			// Session callback for watch mode output
   696‚Üí			sessionCallback := func(providerID string, session *spi.AgentChatSession) {
   697‚Üí				// Check if markdown file already exists to determine if this is an update or creation
   698‚Üí				fileFullPath := buildSessionFilePath(session, config.GetHistoryDir(), useUTC)
   699‚Üí				_, fileExistsErr := os.Stat(fileFullPath)
   700‚Üí				fileExists := fileExistsErr == nil
   701‚Üí
   702‚Üí				// Process the session (write markdown and sync to cloud)
   703‚Üí				// Don't show output during watch mode
   704‚Üí				// This is autosave mode (true)
   705‚Üí				markdownSize, err := processSingleSession(session, config, false, true, debugRaw, useUTC)
   706‚Üí				if err != nil {
   707‚Üí					// Log error but continue - don't fail the whole watch
   708‚Üí					// In watch mode, we prioritize keeping the watcher running.
   709‚Üí					// Failed markdown writes or cloud syncs can be retried later via
   710‚Üí					// the sync command, so we just log and continue.
   711‚Üí					slog.Error("Failed to process session update",
   712‚Üí						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
   713‚Üí						"provider", providerID,
   714‚Üí						"error", err)
   715‚Üí					return
   716‚Üí				}
   717‚Üí
   718‚Üí				// Suppress output for existing sessions seen for the first time (initial scan).
   719‚Üí				// New sessions (!fileExists) always get output since they represent real activity.
   720‚Üí				seenMu.Lock()
   721‚Üí				firstSeen := !seenSessions[session.SessionID]
   722‚Üí				seenSessions[session.SessionID] = true
   723‚Üí				seenMu.Unlock()
   724‚Üí				if firstSeen && fileExists {
   725‚Üí					return
   726‚Üí				}
   727‚Üí
   728‚Üí				// Output formatted line to stdout for watch mode
   729‚Üí				if !silent {
   730‚Üí					// Determine if this was an update or creation
   731‚Üí					action := "updated"
   732‚Üí					if !fileExists {
   733‚Üí						action = "created"
   734‚Üí					}
   735‚Üí
   736‚Üí					// Get timestamps from session data
   737‚Üí					startTime := session.CreatedAt
   738‚Üí					endTime := startTime
   739‚Üí					if session.SessionData != nil && session.SessionData.UpdatedAt != "" {
   740‚Üí						endTime = session.SessionData.UpdatedAt
   741‚Üí					}
   742‚Üí
   743‚Üí					// Count messages by role
   744‚Üí					userPrompts := 0
   745‚Üí					agentActivity := 0
   746‚Üí					if session.SessionData != nil {
   747‚Üí						for _, exchange := range session.SessionData.Exchanges {
   748‚Üí							for _, msg := range exchange.Messages {
   749‚Üí								if msg.Role == schema.RoleUser {
   750‚Üí									userPrompts++
   751‚Üí								} else {
   752‚Üí									agentActivity++
   753‚Üí								}
   754‚Üí							}
   755‚Üí						}
   756‚Üí					}
   757‚Üí
   758‚Üí					// Output the formatted line
   759‚Üí					if jsonOutput {
   760‚Üí						record := map[string]interface{}{
   761‚Üí							"timestamp":          time.Now().Format(time.RFC3339),
   762‚Üí							"action":             action,
   763‚Üí							"session_id":         session.SessionID,
   764‚Üí							"start_time":         startTime,
   765‚Üí							"end_time":           endTime,
   766‚Üí							"provider":           providerID,
   767‚Üí							"markdown_size":      markdownSize,
   768‚Üí							"total_user_prompts": userPrompts,
   769‚Üí							"agent_activity":     agentActivity,
   770‚Üí						}
   771‚Üí						if !onlyCloudSync {
   772‚Üí							record["markdown_file"] = fileFullPath
   773‚Üí						}
   774‚Üí						_ = json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout).Encode(record)
   775‚Üí					} else {
   776‚Üí						emoji := "‚ôªÔ∏è"
   777‚Üí						if action == "created" {
   778‚Üí							emoji = "‚ú®"
   779‚Üí						}
   780‚Üí						activityWord := "activities"
   781‚Üí						if agentActivity == 1 {
   782‚Üí							activityWord = "activity"
   783‚Üí						}
   784‚Üí						promptWord := "prompts"
   785‚Üí						if userPrompts == 1 {
   786‚Üí							promptWord = "prompt"
   787‚Üí						}
   788‚Üí						fmt.Printf("  %s  %s  %s ¬∑ %s ¬∑ %d %s ¬∑ %d agent %s\n",
   789‚Üí							time.Now().Format("15:04:05"),
   790‚Üí							emoji,
   791‚Üí							providerID,
   792‚Üí							truncateSessionID(session.SessionID),
   793‚Üí							userPrompts,
   794‚Üí							promptWord,
   795‚Üí							agentActivity,
   796‚Üí							activityWord)
   797‚Üí					}
   798‚Üí				}
   799‚Üí
   800‚Üí				// Push agent events to provenance engine for correlation
   801‚Üí				processProvenanceEvents(ctx, provenanceEngine, session)
   802‚Üí			}
   803‚Üí
   804‚Üí			return utils.WatchProviders(ctx, cwd, providers, debugRaw, sessionCallback)
   805‚Üí		},
   806‚Üí	}
   807‚Üí}
   808‚Üí
   809‚Üívar watchCmd *cobra.Command
   810‚Üí
   811‚Üí// createSyncCommand dynamically creates the sync command with provider information
   812‚Üífunc createSyncCommand() *cobra.Command {
   813‚Üí	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   814‚Üí	ids := registry.ListIDs()
   815‚Üí	providerList := registry.GetProviderList()
   816‚Üí
   817‚Üí	// Build dynamic examples
   818‚Üí	examples := `
   819‚Üí# Sync all agents with activity
   820‚Üíspecstory sync`
   821‚Üí
   822‚Üí	if len(ids) > 0 {
   823‚Üí		examples += "\n\n# Sync specific agent"
   824‚Üí		for _, id := range ids {
   825‚Üí			examples += fmt.Sprintf("\nspecstory sync %s", id)
   826‚Üí		}
   827‚Üí	}
   828‚Üí
   829‚Üí	examples += `
   830‚Üí
   831‚Üí# Sync a specific session by UUID
   832‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id>
   833‚Üí
   834‚Üí# Sync multiple sessions
   835‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id-1> -s <session-id-2> -s <session-id-3>
   836‚Üí
   837‚Üí# Output session markdown to stdout without saving
   838‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id> --print
   839‚Üí
   840‚Üí# Output multiple sessions to stdout
   841‚Üíspecstory sync -s <session-id-1> -s <session-id-2> --print
   842‚Üí
   843‚Üí# Sync all sessions for the current directory, with console output
   844‚Üíspecstory sync --console
   845‚Üí
   846‚Üí# Sync all sessions for the current directory, with a log file
   847‚Üíspecstory sync --log`
   848‚Üí
   849‚Üí	longDesc := `Create or update markdown files for the agent sessions in the current working directory.
   850‚Üí
   851‚ÜíBy default, syncs all registered providers that have activity.
   852‚ÜíProvide a specific agent ID to sync a specific provider.`
   853‚Üí	if providerList != "No providers registered" {
   854‚Üí		longDesc += "\n\nAvailable provider IDs: " + providerList + "."
   855‚Üí	}
   856‚Üí
   857‚Üí	return &cobra.Command{
   858‚Üí		Use:     "sync [provider-id]",
   859‚Üí		Aliases: []string{"s"},
   860‚Üí		Short:   "Sync markdown files for terminal coding agent sessions",
   861‚Üí		Long:    longDesc,
   862‚Üí		Example: examples,
   863‚Üí		Args:    cobra.MaximumNArgs(1), // Accept 0 or 1 argument (provider ID)
   864‚Üí		PreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   865‚Üí			// Validate that --print requires -s flag
   866‚Üí			sessionIDs, _ := cmd.Flags().GetStringSlice("session")
   867‚Üí			if printToStdout && len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
   868‚Üí				return utils.ValidationError{Message: "--print requires the -s/--session flag to specify which sessions to output"}
   869‚Üí			}
   870‚Üí			return nil
   871‚Üí		},
   872‚Üí		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
   873‚Üí			// Get session IDs if provided via flag
   874‚Üí			sessionIDs, _ := cmd.Flags().GetStringSlice("session")
   875‚Üí
   876‚Üí			// Handle specific session sync if -s flag is provided
   877‚Üí			if len(sessionIDs) > 0 {
   878‚Üí				return syncSpecificSessions(cmd, args, sessionIDs)
   879‚Üí			}
   880‚Üí
   881‚Üí			slog.Info("Running sync command")
   882‚Üí			registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   883‚Üí
   884‚Üí			// Check if user specified a provider
   885‚Üí			if len(args) > 0 {
   886‚Üí				// Sync specific provider
   887‚Üí				return syncSingleProvider(registry, args[0], cmd)
   888‚Üí			} else {
   889‚Üí				// Sync all providers with activity
   890‚Üí				return syncAllProviders(registry, cmd)
   891‚Üí			}
   892‚Üí		},
   893‚Üí	}
   894‚Üí}
   895‚Üí
   896‚Üí// syncSpecificSessions syncs one or more sessions by their IDs
   897‚Üí// When printToStdout is set, outputs markdown to stdout instead of saving to files.
   898‚Üí// args[0] is the optional provider ID
   899‚Üífunc syncSpecificSessions(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string, sessionIDs []string) error {
   900‚Üí	if len(sessionIDs) == 1 {
   901‚Üí		slog.Info("Running single session sync", "sessionId", sessionIDs[0])
   902‚Üí	} else {
   903‚Üí		slog.Info("Running multiple session sync", "sessionCount", len(sessionIDs))
   904‚Üí	}
   905‚Üí
   906‚Üí	// Get debug-raw flag value
   907‚Üí	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
   908‚Üí	useUTC := getUseUTC(cmd)
   909‚Üí
   910‚Üí	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
   911‚Üí	if err != nil {
   912‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
   913‚Üí		return err
   914‚Üí	}
   915‚Üí
   916‚Üí	// Setup file output and cloud sync (not needed for --print mode)
   917‚Üí	var config utils.OutputConfig
   918‚Üí	if !printToStdout {
   919‚Üí		config, err = utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
   920‚Üí		if err != nil {
   921‚Üí			return err
   922‚Üí		}
   923‚Üí
   924‚Üí		identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
   925‚Üí		if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
   926‚Üí			slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
   927‚Üí		}
   928‚Üí
   929‚Üí		checkAndWarnAuthentication()
   930‚Üí
   931‚Üí		if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
   932‚Üí			return err
   933‚Üí		}
   934‚Üí	}
   935‚Üí
   936‚Üí	registry := factory.GetRegistry()
   937‚Üí
   938‚Üí	// Track statistics for summary output
   939‚Üí	var successCount, notFoundCount, errorCount int
   940‚Üí	var lastError error
   941‚Üí
   942‚Üí	// Resolve provider once if specified (fail fast if provider not found)
   943‚Üí	var specifiedProvider spi.Provider
   944‚Üí	if len(args) > 0 {
   945‚Üí		providerID := args[0]
   946‚Üí		provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
   947‚Üí		if err != nil {
   948‚Üí			if !printToStdout {
   949‚Üí				fmt.Printf("‚ùå Provider '%s' not found\n", providerID)
   950‚Üí			}
   951‚Üí			return fmt.Errorf("provider '%s' not found: %w", providerID, err)
   952‚Üí		}
   953‚Üí		specifiedProvider = provider
   954‚Üí	}
   955‚Üí
   956‚Üí	// Process each session ID
   957‚Üí	var printedSessions int // tracks sessions printed to stdout for separator logic
   958‚Üí	for _, sessionID := range sessionIDs {
   959‚Üí		sessionID = strings.TrimSpace(sessionID)
   960‚Üí		if sessionID == "" {
   961‚Üí			continue // Skip empty session IDs
   962‚Üí		}
   963‚Üí
   964‚Üí		// Find session across providers
   965‚Üí		var session *spi.AgentChatSession
   966‚Üí
   967‚Üí		// Case A: Provider was specified - use it directly
   968‚Üí		if specifiedProvider != nil {
   969‚Üí			session, err = specifiedProvider.GetAgentChatSession(cwd, sessionID, debugRaw)
   970‚Üí			if err != nil {
   971‚Üí				if !printToStdout {
   972‚Üí					fmt.Printf("‚ùå Error getting session '%s' from %s: %v\n", sessionID, specifiedProvider.Name(), err)
   973‚Üí				}
   974‚Üí				slog.Error("Error getting session from provider", "sessionId", sessionID, "provider", specifiedProvider.Name(), "error", err)
   975‚Üí				errorCount++
   976‚Üí				lastError = err
   977‚Üí				continue
   978‚Üí			}
   979‚Üí			if session == nil {
   980‚Üí				if !printToStdout {
   981‚Üí					fmt.Printf("‚ùå Session '%s' not found in %s\n", sessionID, specifiedProvider.Name())
   982‚Üí				}
   983‚Üí				slog.Warn("Session not found in provider", "sessionId", sessionID, "provider", specifiedProvider.Name())
   984‚Üí				notFoundCount++
   985‚Üí				continue
   986‚Üí			}
   987‚Üí		} else {
   988‚Üí			// Case B: No provider specified - try all providers
   989‚Üí			providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
   990‚Üí			for _, id := range providerIDs {
   991‚Üí				provider, err := registry.Get(id)
   992‚Üí				if err != nil {
   993‚Üí					continue
   994‚Üí				}
   995‚Üí
   996‚Üí				session, err = provider.GetAgentChatSession(cwd, sessionID, debugRaw)
   997‚Üí				if err != nil {
   998‚Üí					slog.Debug("Error checking provider for session", "provider", id, "sessionId", sessionID, "error", err)
   999‚Üí					continue
  1000‚Üí				}
  1001‚Üí				if session != nil {
  1002‚Üí					if !silent && !printToStdout {
  1003‚Üí						fmt.Printf("‚úÖ Found session '%s' for %s\n", sessionID, provider.Name())
  1004‚Üí					}
  1005‚Üí					break // Found it, don't check other providers
  1006‚Üí				}
  1007‚Üí			}
  1008‚Üí
  1009‚Üí			if session == nil {
  1010‚Üí				if !printToStdout {
  1011‚Üí					fmt.Printf("‚ùå Session '%s' not found in any provider\n", sessionID)
  1012‚Üí				}
  1013‚Üí				slog.Warn("Session not found in any provider", "sessionId", sessionID)
  1014‚Üí				notFoundCount++
  1015‚Üí				continue
  1016‚Üí			}
  1017‚Üí		}
  1018‚Üí
  1019‚Üí		// Process the found session
  1020‚Üí		if printToStdout {
  1021‚Üí			validateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1022‚Üí			writeDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1023‚Üí
  1024‚Üí			markdownContent, err := markdown.GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
  1025‚Üí			if err != nil {
  1026‚Üí				slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown", "sessionId", session.SessionID, "error", err)
  1027‚Üí				analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1028‚Üí					"session_id": session.SessionID,
  1029‚Üí					"error":      err.Error(),
  1030‚Üí					"mode":       "print",
  1031‚Üí				})
  1032‚Üí				errorCount++
  1033‚Üí				lastError = err
  1034‚Üí				continue
  1035‚Üí			}
  1036‚Üí
  1037‚Üí			// Separate multiple sessions with a horizontal rule
  1038‚Üí			if printedSessions > 0 {
  1039‚Üí				fmt.Print("\n---\n\n")
  1040‚Üí			}
  1041‚Üí			fmt.Print(markdownContent)
  1042‚Üí			printedSessions++
  1043‚Üí			successCount++
  1044‚Üí			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1045‚Üí				"session_id": session.SessionID,
  1046‚Üí				"mode":       "print",
  1047‚Üí			})
  1048‚Üí		} else {
  1049‚Üí			// Normal sync: write to file and optionally cloud sync
  1050‚Üí			if _, err := processSingleSession(session, config, true, false, debugRaw, useUTC); err != nil {
  1051‚Üí				errorCount++
  1052‚Üí				lastError = err
  1053‚Üí			} else {
  1054‚Üí				successCount++
  1055‚Üí			}
  1056‚Üí		}
  1057‚Üí	}
  1058‚Üí
  1059‚Üí	// Print summary if multiple sessions were processed (not for --print mode)
  1060‚Üí	if !printToStdout && len(sessionIDs) > 1 && !silent {
  1061‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1062‚Üí		fmt.Println("üìä Session sync summary:")
  1063‚Üí		fmt.Printf("  ‚úÖ %d %s successfully synced\n", successCount, pluralSession(successCount))
  1064‚Üí		if notFoundCount > 0 {
  1065‚Üí			fmt.Printf("  ‚ùå %d %s not found\n", notFoundCount, pluralSession(notFoundCount))
  1066‚Üí		}
  1067‚Üí		if errorCount > 0 {
  1068‚Üí			fmt.Printf("  ‚ùå %d %s failed with errors\n", errorCount, pluralSession(errorCount))
  1069‚Üí		}
  1070‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1071‚Üí	}
  1072‚Üí
  1073‚Üí	// Return error if any sessions failed
  1074‚Üí	if errorCount > 0 || (notFoundCount > 0 && successCount == 0) {
  1075‚Üí		if lastError != nil {
  1076‚Üí			return lastError
  1077‚Üí		}
  1078‚Üí		return fmt.Errorf("%d %s not found", notFoundCount, pluralSession(notFoundCount))
  1079‚Üí	}
  1080‚Üí
  1081‚Üí	return nil
  1082‚Üí}
  1083‚Üí
  1084‚Üí// validateSessionData runs schema validation on SessionData when in debug mode.
  1085‚Üí// Validation is only performed when debugRaw is true to avoid overhead in normal operation.
  1086‚Üí// Returns true if validation passed or was skipped, false if validation failed.
  1087‚Üífunc validateSessionData(session *spi.AgentChatSession, debugRaw bool) bool {
  1088‚Üí	if !debugRaw || session.SessionData == nil {
  1089‚Üí		return true
  1090‚Üí	}
  1091‚Üí	if !session.SessionData.Validate() {
  1092‚Üí		slog.Warn("SessionData failed schema validation, proceeding anyway",
  1093‚Üí			"sessionId", session.SessionID)
  1094‚Üí		return false
  1095‚Üí	}
  1096‚Üí	return true
  1097‚Üí}
  1098‚Üí
  1099‚Üí// writeDebugSessionData writes debug session data when debugRaw is enabled.
  1100‚Üí// Logs warnings on failure but does not fail the operation.
  1101‚Üífunc writeDebugSessionData(session *spi.AgentChatSession, debugRaw bool) {
  1102‚Üí	if !debugRaw || session.SessionData == nil {
  1103‚Üí		return
  1104‚Üí	}
  1105‚Üí	if err := spi.WriteDebugSessionData(session.SessionID, session.SessionData); err != nil {
  1106‚Üí		slog.Warn("Failed to write debug session data", "sessionId", session.SessionID, "error", err)
  1107‚Üí	}
  1108‚Üí}
  1109‚Üí
  1110‚Üí// formatFilenameTimestamp formats a timestamp for use in filenames
  1111‚Üí// The format is filesystem-safe and matches the markdown title format
  1112‚Üífunc formatFilenameTimestamp(t time.Time, useUTC bool) string {
  1113‚Üí	if useUTC {
  1114‚Üí		// Use UTC with Z suffix: "2006-01-02_15-04-05Z"
  1115‚Üí		return t.UTC().Format("2006-01-02_15-04-05") + "Z"
  1116‚Üí	}
  1117‚Üí	// Use local timezone with offset: "2006-01-02_15-04-05-0700"
  1118‚Üí	return t.Local().Format("2006-01-02_15-04-05-0700")
  1119‚Üí}
  1120‚Üí
  1121‚Üí// buildSessionFilePath constructs the full markdown file path for a session.
  1122‚Üí// All callers need consistent filename generation from session metadata.
  1123‚Üífunc buildSessionFilePath(session *spi.AgentChatSession, historyDir string, useUTC bool) string {
  1124‚Üí	timestamp, _ := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, session.CreatedAt)
  1125‚Üí	timestampStr := formatFilenameTimestamp(timestamp, useUTC)
  1126‚Üí
  1127‚Üí	filename := timestampStr
  1128‚Üí	if session.Slug != "" {
  1129‚Üí		filename = fmt.Sprintf("%s-%s", timestampStr, session.Slug)
  1130‚Üí	}
  1131‚Üí	return filepath.Join(historyDir, filename+".md")
  1132‚Üí}
  1133‚Üí
  1134‚Üí// processSingleSession writes markdown and triggers cloud sync for a single session
  1135‚Üí// isAutosave indicates if this is being called from the run command (true) or sync command (false)
  1136‚Üí// debugRaw enables schema validation (only run in debug mode to avoid overhead)
  1137‚Üí// useUTC controls timestamp format (true=UTC, false=local)
  1138‚Üí// Returns the size of the markdown content in bytes
  1139‚Üífunc processSingleSession(session *spi.AgentChatSession, config utils.OutputConfig, showOutput bool, isAutosave bool, debugRaw bool, useUTC bool) (int, error) {
  1140‚Üí	validateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1141‚Üí	writeDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1142‚Üí
  1143‚Üí	// Generate markdown from SessionData
  1144‚Üí	markdownContent, err := markdown.GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
  1145‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1146‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown from SessionData", "sessionId", session.SessionID, "error", err)
  1147‚Üí		return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to generate markdown: %w", err)
  1148‚Üí	}
  1149‚Üí
  1150‚Üí	// Calculate markdown size in bytes
  1151‚Üí	markdownSize := len(markdownContent)
  1152‚Üí
  1153‚Üí	// Generate filename from timestamp and slug
  1154‚Üí	fileFullPath := buildSessionFilePath(session, config.GetHistoryDir(), useUTC)
  1155‚Üí
  1156‚Üí	if showOutput && !silent {
  1157‚Üí		fmt.Printf("Processing session %s...", session.SessionID)
  1158‚Üí	}
  1159‚Üí
  1160‚Üí	// Check if file already exists with same content
  1161‚Üí	var outcome string
  1162‚Üí	identicalContent := false
  1163‚Üí	fileExists := false
  1164‚Üí	if existingContent, err := os.ReadFile(fileFullPath); err == nil {
  1165‚Üí		fileExists = true
  1166‚Üí		if string(existingContent) == markdownContent {
  1167‚Üí			identicalContent = true
  1168‚Üí			slog.Info("Markdown file already exists with same content, skipping write",
  1169‚Üí				"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1170‚Üí				"path", fileFullPath)
  1171‚Üí		}
  1172‚Üí	}
  1173‚Üí
  1174‚Üí	// Write file if needed (skip if only-cloud-sync is enabled)
  1175‚Üí	if !onlyCloudSync {
  1176‚Üí		if !identicalContent {
  1177‚Üí			// Ensure history directory exists (handles deletion during long-running watch/run)
  1178‚Üí			if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1179‚Üí				return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to ensure history directory: %w", err)
  1180‚Üí			}
  1181‚Üí			err := os.WriteFile(fileFullPath, []byte(markdownContent), 0644)
  1182‚Üí			if err != nil {
  1183‚Üí				// Track write error
  1184‚Üí				if isAutosave {
  1185‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveError, analytics.Properties{
  1186‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1187‚Üí						"error":           err.Error(),
  1188‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1189‚Üí					})
  1190‚Üí				} else {
  1191‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1192‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1193‚Üí						"error":           err.Error(),
  1194‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1195‚Üí					})
  1196‚Üí				}
  1197‚Üí				return 0, fmt.Errorf("error writing markdown file: %w", err)
  1198‚Üí			}
  1199‚Üí
  1200‚Üí			// Track successful write
  1201‚Üí			if isAutosave {
  1202‚Üí				if !fileExists {
  1203‚Üí					// New file created during autosave
  1204‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveNew, analytics.Properties{
  1205‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1206‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1207‚Üí					})
  1208‚Üí				} else {
  1209‚Üí					// File updated during autosave
  1210‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventAutosaveSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1211‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1212‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1213‚Üí					})
  1214‚Üí				}
  1215‚Üí			} else {
  1216‚Üí				if !fileExists {
  1217‚Üí					// New file created during manual sync
  1218‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownNew, analytics.Properties{
  1219‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1220‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1221‚Üí					})
  1222‚Üí				} else {
  1223‚Üí					// File updated during manual sync
  1224‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1225‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1226‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1227‚Üí					})
  1228‚Üí				}
  1229‚Üí			}
  1230‚Üí
  1231‚Üí			slog.Info("Successfully wrote file",
  1232‚Üí				"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1233‚Üí				"path", fileFullPath)
  1234‚Üí		}
  1235‚Üí
  1236‚Üí		// Determine outcome for user feedback
  1237‚Üí		if identicalContent {
  1238‚Üí			outcome = "up to date (skipped)"
  1239‚Üí		} else if fileExists {
  1240‚Üí			outcome = "updated"
  1241‚Üí		} else {
  1242‚Üí			outcome = "created"
  1243‚Üí		}
  1244‚Üí	} else {
  1245‚Üí		// Only cloud sync mode - no local file operations
  1246‚Üí		outcome = "synced to cloud only"
  1247‚Üí		slog.Info("Skipping local file write (only-cloud-sync mode)",
  1248‚Üí			"sessionId", session.SessionID)
  1249‚Üí	}
  1250‚Üí
  1251‚Üí	// Trigger cloud sync with provider-specific data
  1252‚Üí	// In only-cloud-sync mode: always sync (no file to check for identical content)
  1253‚Üí	// In normal mode: skip sync only if identical content AND in autosave mode
  1254‚Üí	if onlyCloudSync || !identicalContent || !isAutosave {
  1255‚Üí		cloud.SyncSessionToCloud(session.SessionID, fileFullPath, markdownContent, []byte(session.RawData), session.SessionData.Provider.Name, isAutosave)
  1256‚Üí	}
  1257‚Üí
  1258‚Üí	if showOutput && !silent {
  1259‚Üí		fmt.Printf(" %s\n", outcome)
  1260‚Üí		fmt.Println() // Visual separation
  1261‚Üí	}
  1262‚Üí
  1263‚Üí	return markdownSize, nil
  1264‚Üí}
  1265‚Üí
  1266‚Üí// preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded optimizes bulk syncs by fetching all session sizes upfront.
  1267‚Üí// This avoids making individual HEAD requests for each session during sync operations.
  1268‚Üí//
  1269‚Üí// The function only performs the preload if:
  1270‚Üí//   - Cloud sync is enabled (noCloudSync flag is false)
  1271‚Üí//   - User is authenticated with SpecStory Cloud
  1272‚Üí//   - A valid projectID can be determined from the identity manager
  1273‚Üí//
  1274‚Üí// Parameters:
  1275‚Üí//   - identityManager: Provides project identity (git_id or workspace_id) for the current project
  1276‚Üí//
  1277‚Üí// The preloaded sizes are cached in the SyncManager and shared across all providers since they
  1278‚Üí// use the same projectID. If the bulk fetch fails or if projectID cannot be determined, individual
  1279‚Üí// sessions will gracefully fall back to HEAD requests during sync.
  1280‚Üí//
  1281‚Üí// This function is safe to call multiple times but should typically be called once before processing
  1282‚Üí// multiple sessions in batch sync operations.
  1283‚Üífunc preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager *utils.ProjectIdentityManager) {
  1284‚Üí	// Skip if cloud sync is disabled or user is not authenticated
  1285‚Üí	if noCloudSync || !cloud.IsAuthenticated() {
  1286‚Üí		return
  1287‚Üí	}
  1288‚Üí
  1289‚Üí	// Get projectID from identity manager - required for cloud sync
  1290‚Üí	projectID, err := identityManager.GetProjectID()
  1291‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1292‚Üí		slog.Warn("Cannot preload session sizes: failed to get project ID", "error", err)
  1293‚Üí		return
  1294‚Üí	}
  1295‚Üí
  1296‚Üí	// Preload bulk sizes once - shared across all providers since they use same projectID
  1297‚Üí	if syncMgr := cloud.GetSyncManager(); syncMgr != nil {
  1298‚Üí		syncMgr.PreloadSessionSizes(projectID)
  1299‚Üí	} else {
  1300‚Üí		slog.Warn("Cannot preload session sizes: sync manager is nil despite authentication")
  1301‚Üí	}
  1302‚Üí}
  1303‚Üí
  1304‚Üí// syncProvider performs the actual sync for a single provider
  1305‚Üí// Returns (sessionCount, error) for analytics tracking
  1306‚Üífunc syncProvider(provider spi.Provider, providerID string, config utils.OutputConfig, debugRaw bool, useUTC bool) (int, error) {
  1307‚Üí	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
  1308‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1309‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
  1310‚Üí		return 0, err
  1311‚Üí	}
  1312‚Üí
  1313‚Üí	// Create progress callback for parsing phase
  1314‚Üí	// The callback updates the "Parsing..." line in place with [n/m] progress
  1315‚Üí	var parseProgress spi.ProgressCallback
  1316‚Üí	if !silent {
  1317‚Üí		providerName := provider.Name()
  1318‚Üí		parseProgress = func(current, total int) {
  1319‚Üí			fmt.Printf("\rParsing %s sessions [%d/%d]", providerName, current, total)
  1320‚Üí			_ = os.Stdout.Sync()
  1321‚Üí		}
  1322‚Üí	}
  1323‚Üí
  1324‚Üí	// Get all sessions from the provider
  1325‚Üí	sessions, err := provider.GetAgentChatSessions(cwd, debugRaw, parseProgress)
  1326‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1327‚Üí		return 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to get sessions: %w", err)
  1328‚Üí	}
  1329‚Üí
  1330‚Üí	sessionCount := len(sessions)
  1331‚Üí
  1332‚Üí	if sessionCount == 0 && !silent {
  1333‚Üí		// This comes after "Parsing..." message, on the same line
  1334‚Üí		fmt.Printf(", no non-empty sessions found for %s\n", provider.Name())
  1335‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1336‚Üí		return 0, nil
  1337‚Üí	}
  1338‚Üí
  1339‚Üí	if !silent {
  1340‚Üí		fmt.Printf("\nSyncing markdown files for %s", provider.Name())
  1341‚Üí	}
  1342‚Üí
  1343‚Üí	// Initialize statistics
  1344‚Üí	stats := &SyncStats{
  1345‚Üí		TotalSessions: sessionCount,
  1346‚Üí	}
  1347‚Üí
  1348‚Üí	historyPath := config.GetHistoryDir()
  1349‚Üí
  1350‚Üí	// Process each session
  1351‚Üí	for i := range sessions {
  1352‚Üí		session := &sessions[i]
  1353‚Üí		validateSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1354‚Üí		writeDebugSessionData(session, debugRaw)
  1355‚Üí
  1356‚Üí		// Generate markdown from SessionData
  1357‚Üí		markdownContent, err := markdown.GenerateMarkdownFromAgentSession(session.SessionData, false, useUTC)
  1358‚Üí		if err != nil {
  1359‚Üí			slog.Error("Failed to generate markdown from SessionData",
  1360‚Üí				"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1361‚Üí				"error", err)
  1362‚Üí			// Track sync error
  1363‚Üí			analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1364‚Üí				"session_id": session.SessionID,
  1365‚Üí				"error":      err.Error(),
  1366‚Üí			})
  1367‚Üí			continue
  1368‚Üí		}
  1369‚Üí
  1370‚Üí		// Generate filename from timestamp and slug
  1371‚Üí		fileFullPath := buildSessionFilePath(session, historyPath, useUTC)
  1372‚Üí
  1373‚Üí		// Check if file already exists with same content
  1374‚Üí		identicalContent := false
  1375‚Üí		fileExists := false
  1376‚Üí		if existingContent, err := os.ReadFile(fileFullPath); err == nil {
  1377‚Üí			fileExists = true
  1378‚Üí			if string(existingContent) == markdownContent {
  1379‚Üí				identicalContent = true
  1380‚Üí				slog.Info("Markdown file already exists with same content, skipping write",
  1381‚Üí					"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1382‚Üí					"path", fileFullPath)
  1383‚Üí			}
  1384‚Üí		}
  1385‚Üí
  1386‚Üí		// Write file if needed (skip if only-cloud-sync is enabled)
  1387‚Üí		if !onlyCloudSync {
  1388‚Üí			if !identicalContent {
  1389‚Üí				// Ensure history directory exists (handles deletion during long-running sync)
  1390‚Üí				if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1391‚Üí					slog.Error("Failed to ensure history directory", "error", err)
  1392‚Üí					continue
  1393‚Üí				}
  1394‚Üí				err := os.WriteFile(fileFullPath, []byte(markdownContent), 0644)
  1395‚Üí				if err != nil {
  1396‚Üí					slog.Error("Error writing markdown file",
  1397‚Üí						"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1398‚Üí						"error", err)
  1399‚Üí					// Track sync error
  1400‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1401‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1402‚Üí						"error":           err.Error(),
  1403‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1404‚Üí					})
  1405‚Üí					continue
  1406‚Üí				}
  1407‚Üí				slog.Info("Successfully wrote file",
  1408‚Üí					"sessionId", session.SessionID,
  1409‚Üí					"path", fileFullPath)
  1410‚Üí
  1411‚Üí				// Track successful sync
  1412‚Üí				if !fileExists {
  1413‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownNew, analytics.Properties{
  1414‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1415‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1416‚Üí					})
  1417‚Üí				} else {
  1418‚Üí					analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1419‚Üí						"session_id":      session.SessionID,
  1420‚Üí						"only_cloud_sync": onlyCloudSync,
  1421‚Üí					})
  1422‚Üí				}
  1423‚Üí			}
  1424‚Üí
  1425‚Üí			// Update statistics for normal mode
  1426‚Üí			if identicalContent {
  1427‚Üí				stats.SessionsSkipped++
  1428‚Üí			} else if fileExists {
  1429‚Üí				stats.SessionsUpdated++
  1430‚Üí			} else {
  1431‚Üí				stats.SessionsCreated++
  1432‚Üí			}
  1433‚Üí		} else {
  1434‚Üí			// In cloud-only mode, count as skipped since no local file operation occurred
  1435‚Üí			stats.SessionsSkipped++
  1436‚Üí			slog.Info("Skipping local file write (only-cloud-sync mode)",
  1437‚Üí				"sessionId", session.SessionID)
  1438‚Üí		}
  1439‚Üí
  1440‚Üí		// Trigger cloud sync with provider-specific data
  1441‚Üí		// Manual sync command: perform immediate sync with HEAD check (not autosave mode)
  1442‚Üí		// In only-cloud-sync mode: always sync
  1443‚Üí		cloud.SyncSessionToCloud(session.SessionID, fileFullPath, markdownContent, []byte(session.RawData), provider.Name(), false)
  1444‚Üí
  1445‚Üí		// Print progress with [n/m] format
  1446‚Üí		if !silent {
  1447‚Üí			fmt.Printf("\rSyncing markdown files for %s [%d/%d]", provider.Name(), i+1, sessionCount)
  1448‚Üí			_ = os.Stdout.Sync()
  1449‚Üí		}
  1450‚Üí	}
  1451‚Üí
  1452‚Üí	// Print newline after progress
  1453‚Üí	if !silent && sessionCount > 0 && !onlyCloudSync {
  1454‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1455‚Üí
  1456‚Üí		// Calculate actual total of processed sessions
  1457‚Üí		actualTotal := stats.SessionsSkipped + stats.SessionsUpdated + stats.SessionsCreated
  1458‚Üí
  1459‚Üí		// Print summary message with proper pluralization
  1460‚Üí		fmt.Printf("\n%s‚úÖ %s sync complete!%s üìä %s%d%s %s processed\n",
  1461‚Üí			log.ColorBoldGreen, provider.Name(), log.ColorReset,
  1462‚Üí			log.ColorBoldCyan, actualTotal, log.ColorReset, pluralSession(actualTotal))
  1463‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1464‚Üí
  1465‚Üí		fmt.Printf("  ‚è≠Ô∏è %s%d %s up to date (skipped)%s\n",
  1466‚Üí			log.ColorCyan, stats.SessionsSkipped, pluralSession(stats.SessionsSkipped), log.ColorReset)
  1467‚Üí		fmt.Printf("  ‚ôªÔ∏è %s%d %s updated%s\n",
  1468‚Üí			log.ColorYellow, stats.SessionsUpdated, pluralSession(stats.SessionsUpdated), log.ColorReset)
  1469‚Üí		fmt.Printf("  ‚ú® %s%d new %s created%s\n",
  1470‚Üí			log.ColorGreen, stats.SessionsCreated, pluralSession(stats.SessionsCreated), log.ColorReset)
  1471‚Üí		fmt.Println()
  1472‚Üí	}
  1473‚Üí
  1474‚Üí	return sessionCount, nil
  1475‚Üí}
  1476‚Üí
  1477‚Üí// syncAllProviders syncs all providers that have activity in the current directory
  1478‚Üífunc syncAllProviders(registry *factory.Registry, cmd *cobra.Command) error {
  1479‚Üí	// Get debug-raw flag value
  1480‚Üí	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
  1481‚Üí	useUTC := getUseUTC(cmd)
  1482‚Üí
  1483‚Üí	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
  1484‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1485‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
  1486‚Üí		return err
  1487‚Üí	}
  1488‚Üí
  1489‚Üí	providerIDs := registry.ListIDs()
  1490‚Üí	providersWithActivity := []string{}
  1491‚Üí
  1492‚Üí	// Check each provider for activity
  1493‚Üí	for _, id := range providerIDs {
  1494‚Üí		provider, err := registry.Get(id)
  1495‚Üí		if err != nil {
  1496‚Üí			slog.Warn("Failed to get provider", "id", id, "error", err)
  1497‚Üí			continue
  1498‚Üí		}
  1499‚Üí
  1500‚Üí		if provider.DetectAgent(cwd, false) {
  1501‚Üí			providersWithActivity = append(providersWithActivity, id)
  1502‚Üí		}
  1503‚Üí	}
  1504‚Üí
  1505‚Üí	// If no providers have activity, show helpful message
  1506‚Üí	if len(providersWithActivity) == 0 {
  1507‚Üí		if !silent {
  1508‚Üí			fmt.Println() // Add visual separation
  1509‚Üí			log.UserWarn("No coding agent activity found for this project directory.\n\n")
  1510‚Üí
  1511‚Üí			log.UserMessage("We checked for activity in '%s' from the following agents:\n", cwd)
  1512‚Üí			for _, id := range providerIDs {
  1513‚Üí				if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
  1514‚Üí					log.UserMessage("- %s\n", provider.Name())
  1515‚Üí				}
  1516‚Üí			}
  1517‚Üí			log.UserMessage("\nBut didn't find any activity.\n\n")
  1518‚Üí
  1519‚Üí			log.UserMessage("To fix this:\n")
  1520‚Üí			log.UserMessage("  1. Run 'specstory run' to start the default agent in this directory\n")
  1521‚Üí			log.UserMessage("  2. Run 'specstory run <agent>' to start a specific agent in this directory\n")
  1522‚Üí			log.UserMessage("  3. Or run the agent directly first, then try syncing again\n")
  1523‚Üí			fmt.Println() // Add trailing newline
  1524‚Üí		}
  1525‚Üí		return nil
  1526‚Üí	}
  1527‚Üí
  1528‚Üí	// Collect provider names for analytics
  1529‚Üí	var providerNames []string
  1530‚Üí	for _, id := range providersWithActivity {
  1531‚Üí		if provider, err := registry.Get(id); err == nil {
  1532‚Üí			providerNames = append(providerNames, provider.Name())
  1533‚Üí		}
  1534‚Üí	}
  1535‚Üí	analytics.SetAgentProviders(providerNames)
  1536‚Üí
  1537‚Üí	// Setup output configuration (once for all providers)
  1538‚Üí	config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
  1539‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1540‚Üí		return err
  1541‚Üí	}
  1542‚Üí
  1543‚Üí	// Initialize project identity (once for all providers)
  1544‚Üí	identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
  1545‚Üí	if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
  1546‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
  1547‚Üí	}
  1548‚Üí
  1549‚Üí	// Check authentication for cloud sync (once)
  1550‚Üí	checkAndWarnAuthentication()
  1551‚Üí
  1552‚Üí	// Ensure history directory exists (once)
  1553‚Üí	if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1554‚Üí		return err
  1555‚Üí	}
  1556‚Üí
  1557‚Üí	// Preload session sizes for batch sync optimization (ONCE for all providers)
  1558‚Üí	preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager)
  1559‚Üí
  1560‚Üí	// Sync each provider with activity
  1561‚Üí	totalSessionCount := 0
  1562‚Üí	var lastError error
  1563‚Üí
  1564‚Üí	for _, id := range providersWithActivity {
  1565‚Üí		provider, err := registry.Get(id)
  1566‚Üí		if err != nil {
  1567‚Üí			continue
  1568‚Üí		}
  1569‚Üí
  1570‚Üí		if !silent {
  1571‚Üí			fmt.Printf("\nParsing %s sessions", provider.Name())
  1572‚Üí		}
  1573‚Üí
  1574‚Üí		sessionCount, err := syncProvider(provider, id, config, debugRaw, useUTC)
  1575‚Üí		totalSessionCount += sessionCount
  1576‚Üí
  1577‚Üí		if err != nil {
  1578‚Üí			lastError = err
  1579‚Üí			slog.Error("Error syncing provider", "provider", id, "error", err)
  1580‚Üí		}
  1581‚Üí	}
  1582‚Üí
  1583‚Üí	// Track overall analytics
  1584‚Üí	if lastError != nil {
  1585‚Üí		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1586‚Üí			"provider":      "all",
  1587‚Üí			"error":         lastError.Error(),
  1588‚Üí			"session_count": totalSessionCount,
  1589‚Üí		})
  1590‚Üí		// Brief delay to ensure error event is sent before exit
  1591‚Üí		// TODO: This is a workaround for async analytics - should be fixed properly
  1592‚Üí		time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
  1593‚Üí	} else {
  1594‚Üí		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1595‚Üí			"provider":      "all",
  1596‚Üí			"session_count": totalSessionCount,
  1597‚Üí		})
  1598‚Üí	}
  1599‚Üí
  1600‚Üí	return lastError
  1601‚Üí}
  1602‚Üí
  1603‚Üí// syncSingleProvider syncs a specific provider
  1604‚Üífunc syncSingleProvider(registry *factory.Registry, providerID string, cmd *cobra.Command) error {
  1605‚Üí	// Get debug-raw flag value
  1606‚Üí	debugRaw, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("debug-raw")
  1607‚Üí	useUTC := getUseUTC(cmd)
  1608‚Üí
  1609‚Üí	provider, err := registry.Get(providerID)
  1610‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1611‚Üí		// Provider not found - show helpful error
  1612‚Üí		fmt.Printf("‚ùå Provider '%s' is not a valid provider implementation\n\n", providerID)
  1613‚Üí
  1614‚Üí		ids := registry.ListIDs()
  1615‚Üí		if len(ids) > 0 {
  1616‚Üí			fmt.Println("The registered providers are:")
  1617‚Üí			for _, id := range ids {
  1618‚Üí				if p, _ := registry.Get(id); p != nil {
  1619‚Üí					fmt.Printf("  ‚Ä¢ %s - %s\n", id, p.Name())
  1620‚Üí				}
  1621‚Üí			}
  1622‚Üí			fmt.Println("\nExample: specstory sync " + ids[0])
  1623‚Üí		}
  1624‚Üí		return err
  1625‚Üí	}
  1626‚Üí
  1627‚Üí	// Set the agent provider for analytics
  1628‚Üí	analytics.SetAgentProviders([]string{provider.Name()})
  1629‚Üí
  1630‚Üí	cwd, err := os.Getwd()
  1631‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1632‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to get current working directory", "error", err)
  1633‚Üí		return err
  1634‚Üí	}
  1635‚Üí
  1636‚Üí	// Check if provider has activity, with helpful output if not
  1637‚Üí	if !provider.DetectAgent(cwd, true) {
  1638‚Üí		// Provider already output helpful message
  1639‚Üí		return nil
  1640‚Üí	}
  1641‚Üí
  1642‚Üí	// Setup output configuration
  1643‚Üí	config, err := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
  1644‚Üí	if err != nil {
  1645‚Üí		return err
  1646‚Üí	}
  1647‚Üí
  1648‚Üí	// Initialize project identity
  1649‚Üí	identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
  1650‚Üí	if _, err := identityManager.EnsureProjectIdentity(); err != nil {
  1651‚Üí		slog.Error("Failed to ensure project identity", "error", err)
  1652‚Üí	}
  1653‚Üí
  1654‚Üí	// Check authentication for cloud sync
  1655‚Üí	checkAndWarnAuthentication()
  1656‚Üí
  1657‚Üí	// Ensure history directory exists
  1658‚Üí	if err := utils.EnsureHistoryDirectoryExists(config); err != nil {
  1659‚Üí		return err
  1660‚Üí	}
  1661‚Üí
  1662‚Üí	// Preload session sizes for batch sync optimization
  1663‚Üí	preloadBulkSessionSizesIfNeeded(identityManager)
  1664‚Üí
  1665‚Üí	if !silent {
  1666‚Üí		fmt.Printf("\nParsing %s sessions", provider.Name())
  1667‚Üí	}
  1668‚Üí
  1669‚Üí	// Perform the sync
  1670‚Üí	sessionCount, syncErr := syncProvider(provider, providerID, config, debugRaw, useUTC)
  1671‚Üí
  1672‚Üí	// Track analytics
  1673‚Üí	if syncErr != nil {
  1674‚Üí		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownError, analytics.Properties{
  1675‚Üí			"provider":      providerID,
  1676‚Üí			"error":         syncErr.Error(),
  1677‚Üí			"session_count": sessionCount,
  1678‚Üí		})
  1679‚Üí		// Brief delay to ensure error event is sent before exit
  1680‚Üí		// TODO: This is a workaround for async analytics - should be fixed properly
  1681‚Üí		time.Sleep(500 * time.Millisecond)
  1682‚Üí	} else {
  1683‚Üí		analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventSyncMarkdownSuccess, analytics.Properties{
  1684‚Üí			"provider":      providerID,
  1685‚Üí			"session_count": sessionCount,
  1686‚Üí		})
  1687‚Üí	}
  1688‚Üí
  1689‚Üí	return syncErr
  1690‚Üí}
  1691‚Üí
  1692‚Üívar syncCmd *cobra.Command
  1693‚Üí
  1694‚Üí// Main entry point for the CLI
  1695‚Üífunc main() {
  1696‚Üí	// Parse critical flags early by manually checking os.Args
  1697‚Üí	// This is necessary because cobra's ParseFlags doesn't work correctly before subcommands are added
  1698‚Üí	for _, arg := range os.Args[1:] {
  1699‚Üí		switch arg {
  1700‚Üí		case "--no-usage-analytics":
  1701‚Üí			noAnalytics = true
  1702‚Üí		case "--console":
  1703‚Üí			console = true
  1704‚Üí		case "--log":
  1705‚Üí			logFile = true
  1706‚Üí		case "--debug":
  1707‚Üí			debug = true
  1708‚Üí		case "--silent":
  1709‚Üí			silent = true
  1710‚Üí		case "--no-version-check":
  1711‚Üí			noVersionCheck = true
  1712‚Üí		}
  1713‚Üí		// Handle --output-dir=value format
  1714‚Üí		if strings.HasPrefix(arg, "--output-dir=") {
  1715‚Üí			outputDir = strings.TrimPrefix(arg, "--output-dir=")
  1716‚Üí		}
  1717‚Üí	}
  1718‚Üí
  1719‚Üí	// Set up logging early before creating commands (which access the registry)
  1720‚Üí	if console || logFile {
  1721‚Üí		var logPath string
  1722‚Üí		if logFile {
  1723‚Üí			config, _ := utils.SetupOutputConfig(outputDir)
  1724‚Üí			logPath = config.GetLogPath()
  1725‚Üí		}
  1726‚Üí		_ = log.SetupLogger(console, logFile, debug, logPath)
  1727‚Üí	} else {
  1728‚Üí		// Set up discard logger to prevent default slog output
  1729‚Üí		_ = log.SetupLogger(false, false, false, "")
  1730‚Üí	}
  1731‚Üí
  1732‚Üí	// NOW create the commands - after logging is configured
  1733‚Üí	rootCmd = createRootCommand()
  1734‚Üí	runCmd = createRunCommand()
  1735‚Üí	watchCmd = createWatchCommand()
  1736‚Üí	syncCmd = createSyncCommand()
  1737‚Üí	listCmd := cmd.CreateListCommand()
  1738‚Üí	checkCmd := cmd.CreateCheckCommand()
  1739‚Üí	versionCmd := cmd.CreateVersionCommand(version)
  1740‚Üí	loginCmd := cmd.CreateLoginCommand(&cloudURL)
  1741‚Üí	logoutCmd := cmd.CreateLogoutCommand(&cloudURL)
  1742‚Üí
  1743‚Üí	// Set version for the automatic version flag
  1744‚Üí	rootCmd.Version = version
  1745‚Üí
  1746‚Üí	// Override the default version template to match our version command output
  1747‚Üí	rootCmd.SetVersionTemplate("{{.Version}} (SpecStory)")
  1748‚Üí
  1749‚Üí	// Set our custom help command (for "specstory help")
  1750‚Üí	helpCmd := cmd.CreateHelpCommand(rootCmd)
  1751‚Üí	rootCmd.SetHelpCommand(helpCmd)
  1752‚Üí
  1753‚Üí	// Add the subcommands
  1754‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(runCmd)
  1755‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(watchCmd)
  1756‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(syncCmd)
  1757‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(listCmd)
  1758‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(versionCmd)
  1759‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(checkCmd)
  1760‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(loginCmd)
  1761‚Üí	rootCmd.AddCommand(logoutCmd)
  1762‚Üí
  1763‚Üí	// Global flags available on all commands
  1764‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&console, "console", false, "enable error/warn/info output to stdout")
  1765‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&logFile, "log", false, "write error/warn/info output to ./.specstory/debug/debug.log")
  1766‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&debug, "debug", false, "enable debug-level output (requires --console or --log)")
  1767‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&noAnalytics, "no-usage-analytics", false, "disable usage analytics")
  1768‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&silent, "silent", false, "suppress all non-error output")
  1769‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().BoolVar(&noVersionCheck, "no-version-check", false, "skip checking for newer versions")
  1770‚Üí	rootCmd.PersistentFlags().StringVar(&cloudToken, "cloud-token", "", "use a SpecStory Cloud refresh token for this session (bypasses login)")
  1771‚Üí	_ = rootCmd.PersistentFlags().MarkHidden("cloud-token") // Hidden flag
  1772‚Üí
  1773‚Üí	// Command-specific flags
  1774‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().StringSliceP("session", "s", []string{}, "optional session IDs to sync (can be specified multiple times, provider-specific format)")
  1775‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&printToStdout, "print", false, "output session markdown to stdout instead of saving (requires -s flag)")
  1776‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&outputDir, "output-dir", "", "custom output directory for markdown and debug files (default: ./.specstory/history)")
  1777‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noCloudSync, "no-cloud-sync", false, "disable cloud sync functionality")
  1778‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&onlyCloudSync, "only-cloud-sync", false, "skip local markdown file saves, only upload to cloud (requires authentication)")
  1779‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().StringVar(&cloudURL, "cloud-url", "", "override the default cloud API base URL")
  1780‚Üí	_ = syncCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("cloud-url") // Hidden flag
  1781‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().Bool("debug-raw", false, "debug mode to output pretty-printed raw data files")
  1782‚Üí	_ = syncCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("debug-raw") // Hidden flag
  1783‚Üí	syncCmd.Flags().BoolP("local-time-zone", "", false, "use local timezone for file name and content timestamps (when not present: UTC)")
  1784‚Üí
  1785‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&provenanceEnabled, "provenance", false, "enable AI provenance tracking (correlate file changes to agent activity)")
  1786‚Üí	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("provenance") // Hidden flag
  1787‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().StringP("command", "c", "", "custom agent execution command for the provider")
  1788‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().String("resume", "", "resume a specific session by ID")
  1789‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&outputDir, "output-dir", "", "custom output directory for markdown and debug files (default: ./.specstory/history)")
  1790‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noCloudSync, "no-cloud-sync", false, "disable cloud sync functionality")
  1791‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&onlyCloudSync, "only-cloud-sync", false, "skip local markdown file saves, only upload to cloud (requires authentication)")
  1792‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().StringVar(&cloudURL, "cloud-url", "", "override the default cloud API base URL")
  1793‚Üí	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("cloud-url") // Hidden flag
  1794‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().Bool("debug-raw", false, "debug mode to output pretty-printed raw data files")
  1795‚Üí	_ = runCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("debug-raw") // Hidden flag
  1796‚Üí	runCmd.Flags().BoolP("local-time-zone", "", false, "use local timezone for file name and content timestamps (when not present: UTC)")
  1797‚Üí
  1798‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&provenanceEnabled, "provenance", false, "enable AI provenance tracking (correlate file changes to agent activity)")
  1799‚Üí	_ = watchCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("provenance") // Hidden flag
  1800‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().StringVar(&outputDir, "output-dir", "", "custom output directory for markdown and debug files (default: ./.specstory/history)")
  1801‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&noCloudSync, "no-cloud-sync", false, "disable cloud sync functionality")
  1802‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&onlyCloudSync, "only-cloud-sync", false, "skip local markdown file saves, only upload to cloud (requires authentication)")
  1803‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().StringVar(&cloudURL, "cloud-url", "", "override the default cloud API base URL")
  1804‚Üí	_ = watchCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("cloud-url") // Hidden flag
  1805‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().Bool("debug-raw", false, "debug mode to output pretty-printed raw data files")
  1806‚Üí	_ = watchCmd.Flags().MarkHidden("debug-raw") // Hidden flag
  1807‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().BoolVar(&jsonOutput, "json", false, "output session updates as JSON lines (one JSON object per line)")
  1808‚Üí	watchCmd.Flags().BoolP("local-time-zone", "", false, "use local timezone for file name and content timestamps (when not present: UTC)")
  1809‚Üí
  1810‚Üí	// Initialize analytics with the full CLI command (unless disabled)
  1811‚Üí	slog.Debug("Analytics initialization check", "noAnalytics", noAnalytics, "flag_should_disable", noAnalytics)
  1812‚Üí	if !noAnalytics {
  1813‚Üí		slog.Debug("Initializing analytics")
  1814‚Üí		fullCommand := strings.Join(os.Args, " ")
  1815‚Üí		if err := analytics.Init(fullCommand, version); err != nil {
  1816‚Üí			// Log error but don't fail - analytics should not break the app
  1817‚Üí			slog.Warn("Failed to initialize analytics", "error", err)
  1818‚Üí		}
  1819‚Üí		defer func() { _ = analytics.Close() }() // Analytics errors shouldn't break the app
  1820‚Üí	} else {
  1821‚Üí		slog.Debug("Analytics disabled by --no-usage-analytics flag")
  1822‚Üí	}
  1823‚Üí
  1824‚Üí	// Check for updates (blocking)
  1825‚Üí	utils.CheckForUpdates(version, noVersionCheck, silent)
  1826‚Üí
  1827‚Üí	// Ensure proper cleanup and logging on exit
  1828‚Üí	defer func() {
  1829‚Üí		if r := recover(); r != nil {
  1830‚Üí			slog.Error("=== SpecStory PANIC ===", "panic", r)
  1831‚Üí			// Still try to wait for cloud sync even on panic
  1832‚Üí			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1833‚Üí			log.CloseLogger()
  1834‚Üí			panic(r) // Re-panic after logging
  1835‚Üí		}
  1836‚Üí		// Wait for cloud sync operations to complete before exiting
  1837‚Üí		cloudStats := cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1838‚Üí
  1839‚Üí		// Track cloud sync analytics if we have stats
  1840‚Üí		if cloudStats != nil {
  1841‚Üí			// Calculate total attempted (all sessions that started sync)
  1842‚Üí			totalCloudSessions := cloudStats.SessionsAttempted
  1843‚Üí
  1844‚Üí			// Track cloud sync completion event
  1845‚Üí			if cloudStats.SessionsUpdated > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsCreated > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsErrored > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut > 0 {
  1846‚Üí				analytics.TrackEvent(analytics.EventCloudSyncComplete, analytics.Properties{
  1847‚Üí					"sessions_created":   cloudStats.SessionsCreated,
  1848‚Üí					"sessions_updated":   cloudStats.SessionsUpdated,
  1849‚Üí					"sessions_skipped":   cloudStats.SessionsSkipped,
  1850‚Üí					"sessions_errored":   cloudStats.SessionsErrored,
  1851‚Üí					"sessions_timed_out": cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut,
  1852‚Üí					"total":              totalCloudSessions,
  1853‚Üí				})
  1854‚Üí			}
  1855‚Üí
  1856‚Üí			// Display cloud sync stats if not in silent mode
  1857‚Üí			if !silent && totalCloudSessions > 0 {
  1858‚Üí				fmt.Println() // Visual separation from provider sync output
  1859‚Üí
  1860‚Üí				// Determine if sync was complete or incomplete based on errors/timeouts
  1861‚Üí				if cloudStats.SessionsErrored > 0 || cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut > 0 {
  1862‚Üí					fmt.Printf("‚ùå Cloud sync incomplete! üìä %s%d%s %s processed\n",
  1863‚Üí						log.ColorBoldCyan, totalCloudSessions, log.ColorReset, pluralSession(int(totalCloudSessions)))
  1864‚Üí				} else {
  1865‚Üí					fmt.Printf("‚òÅÔ∏è  Cloud sync complete! üìä %s%d%s %s processed\n",
  1866‚Üí						log.ColorBoldCyan, totalCloudSessions, log.ColorReset, pluralSession(int(totalCloudSessions)))
  1867‚Üí				}
  1868‚Üí				fmt.Println()
  1869‚Üí
  1870‚Üí				fmt.Printf("  ‚è≠Ô∏è %s%d %s up to date (skipped)%s\n",
  1871‚Üí					log.ColorCyan, cloudStats.SessionsSkipped, pluralSession(int(cloudStats.SessionsSkipped)), log.ColorReset)
  1872‚Üí				fmt.Printf("  ‚ôªÔ∏è %s%d %s updated%s\n",
  1873‚Üí					log.ColorYellow, cloudStats.SessionsUpdated, pluralSession(int(cloudStats.SessionsUpdated)), log.ColorReset)
  1874‚Üí				fmt.Printf("  ‚ú® %s%d new %s created%s\n",
  1875‚Üí					log.ColorGreen, cloudStats.SessionsCreated, pluralSession(int(cloudStats.SessionsCreated)), log.ColorReset)
  1876‚Üí
  1877‚Üí				// Only show errors if there were any
  1878‚Üí				if cloudStats.SessionsErrored > 0 {
  1879‚Üí					fmt.Printf("  ‚ùå %s%d %s errored%s\n",
  1880‚Üí						log.ColorRed, cloudStats.SessionsErrored, pluralSession(int(cloudStats.SessionsErrored)), log.ColorReset)
  1881‚Üí				}
  1882‚Üí
  1883‚Üí				// Only show timed out sessions if there were any
  1884‚Üí				if cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut > 0 {
  1885‚Üí					fmt.Printf("  ‚è±Ô∏è  %s%d %s timed out%s\n",
  1886‚Üí						log.ColorRed, cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut, pluralSession(int(cloudStats.SessionsTimedOut)), log.ColorReset)
  1887‚Üí				}
  1888‚Üí				fmt.Println()
  1889‚Üí
  1890‚Üí				// Display link to SpecStory Cloud (deep link to session if from run command)
  1891‚Üí				cwd, cwdErr := os.Getwd()
  1892‚Üí				if cwdErr == nil {
  1893‚Üí					identityManager := utils.NewProjectIdentityManager(cwd)
  1894‚Üí					if projectID, err := identityManager.GetProjectID(); err == nil {
  1895‚Üí						fmt.Printf("üí° Search and chat with your AI conversation history at:\n")
  1896‚Üí						if lastRunSessionID != "" {
  1897‚Üí							// Deep link to the specific session from run command
  1898‚Üí							fmt.Printf("   %shttps://cloud.specstory.com/projects/%s/sessions/%s%s\n\n",
  1899‚Üí								log.ColorBoldCyan, projectID, lastRunSessionID, log.ColorReset)
  1900‚Üí						} else {
  1901‚Üí							// Link to project overview for sync command
  1902‚Üí							fmt.Printf("   %shttps://cloud.specstory.com/projects/%s%s\n\n",
  1903‚Üí								log.ColorBoldCyan, projectID, log.ColorReset)
  1904‚Üí						}
  1905‚Üí					}
  1906‚Üí				}
  1907‚Üí			}
  1908‚Üí		}
  1909‚Üí
  1910‚Üí		if console || logFile {
  1911‚Üí			slog.Info("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 0, "status", "normal termination")
  1912‚Üí		}
  1913‚Üí		log.CloseLogger()
  1914‚Üí	}()
  1915‚Üí
  1916‚Üí	if err := fang.Execute(context.Background(), rootCmd, fang.WithVersion(version)); err != nil {
  1917‚Üí		// Check if we're running the check command by looking at the executed command
  1918‚Üí		executedCmd, _, _ := rootCmd.Find(os.Args[1:])
  1919‚Üí		if executedCmd == checkCmd {
  1920‚Üí			if console || logFile {
  1921‚Üí				slog.Error("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 2, "status", "agent execution failure")
  1922‚Üí				slog.Error("Error", "error", err)
  1923‚Üí			}
  1924‚Üí			// For check command, the error details are handled by checkSingleProvider/checkAllProviders
  1925‚Üí			// So we just exit silently here
  1926‚Üí			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1927‚Üí			os.Exit(2)
  1928‚Üí		} else {
  1929‚Üí			if console || logFile {
  1930‚Üí				slog.Error("=== SpecStory Exiting ===", "code", 1, "status", "error")
  1931‚Üí				slog.Error("Error", "error", err)
  1932‚Üí			}
  1933‚Üí			fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr) // Visual separation makes error output more noticeable
  1934‚Üí
  1935‚Üí			// Only show usage for actual command/flag errors from Cobra
  1936‚Üí			// These are errors like "unknown command", "unknown flag", "invalid argument", etc.
  1937‚Üí			// For all other errors (authentication, network, file system, etc.), we should NOT show usage
  1938‚Üí			errMsg := err.Error()
  1939‚Üí			isCommandError := strings.Contains(errMsg, "unknown command") ||
  1940‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "unknown flag") ||
  1941‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "invalid argument") ||
  1942‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "required flag") ||
  1943‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "accepts") || // e.g., "accepts 1 arg(s), received 2"
  1944‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "no such flag") ||
  1945‚Üí				strings.Contains(errMsg, "flag needs an argument")
  1946‚Üí
  1947‚Üí			if isCommandError {
  1948‚Üí				_ = rootCmd.Usage() // Ignore error; we're exiting anyway
  1949‚Üí				fmt.Println()       // Add visual separation after usage for better CLI readability
  1950‚Üí			}
  1951‚Üí			_ = cloud.Shutdown(cloud.CloudSyncTimeout)
  1952‚Üí			os.Exit(1)
  1953‚Üí		}
  1954‚Üí	}
  1955‚Üí}
  1956‚Üí
```
